observation.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && cmake --build build -t task1 2>&1 | tail -5 && ./build/task/1/antlr/task1 build/test/task0/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c /tmp/test0.txt && diff /tmp/test0.txt build/test/task1/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c/answer.txt && echo "OK000"
